name: audit-pack-emit --format html writes bundle.html with inline content and no external asset references per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format html --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && grep -q '<title>Audit Pack abc123' out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.html && ! grep -q '<link\|<script src' out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.html && echo ok 1>&2
